---
title: The long haulers
author: Daniel Lefever
date: '2020-08-03'
slug: the-long-haulers
categories:
  - COVID-19
  - disease severity
  - epidemiology
tags: []
---


[persistent symptoms](https://jamanetwork.com/journals/jama/fullarticle/2768351)

[risk factors](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-020-2521-4_reference.pdf)

# The long-haulers


[long haulers](https://news.berkeley.edu/2020/07/08/from-lung-scarring-to-heart-damage-covid-19-may-leave-lingering-marks/)
